## 🚀 Sobre Mí

```typescript
const desarrollador = {
    nombre: "Miguel Flores",
    rol: "Full Stack Developer",
    código: ["JavaScript", "PHP", "Python", "Java"],
    herramientas: ["React", "Node.js", "Docker", "GCP"],
    arquitectura: ["Microservicios", "Event-Driven", "Serverless"]
};
```
